productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Men Blue Dial Chronograph Watch
description: Tattoo artist ed hardy has taken the world by storm with his funky, urban brand - from rock stars to Hollywood legends, those who have a quirky taste in fashion love the tattoo inspired designs. Wear this watch to prove you're a style maverick not a trend follower. Case diameter: 46 mm Case thickness: 6 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Black plastic round case Black rubber strap with a tang clasp Blue printed dial with white hands ed hardy branding on the bezel One chronograph display Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
